title: MEAT AND POULTRY INSPECTION LAW
doc_html:
CHAPTER 14.  MEAT AND POULTRY INSPECTION LAW

§2271.  R.S. 40:2271 through 2301 were redesignated as R.S. 3:4201 through 4233 pursuant to Acts 1985, No. 73, §1.
